name: Axalta Coating Systems Ltd.
description: Axalta Coating Systems Ltd. is a leading global manufacturer, marketer, and distributor of high-performance coatings systems. Operating in two segments, Performance Coatings and Transportation Coatings, the company provides liquid and powder coatings to a diverse range of customers, including the automotive refinish, commercial vehicle, and industrial markets. With over 150 years of experience in the coatings industry, Axalta serves customers in approximately 140 countries, delivering innovative, colorful, beautiful, and sustainable solutions designed to prevent corrosion, increase productivity, and enhance durability.
